# painspecialist.blog
> Medical blog by fellowship-certified pain management
  specialists at Painex Pain Management Clinic, Pune, India.

## Authors

- Dr. Kashinath Bangar | MBBS DNB FIPM FIAPM
  Founder & Director, Painex Clinic Pune
  National GC Member IAPM | Published Researcher
  Honorary Consultant: Ruby Hall Clinic, Sahyadri Hospital,
  Joshi Hospital, Ratna Memorial Hospital, MJM Hospital, Pune
  Fellowship in Pain & Palliative Care, Kolkata
  Published author in national & international pain journals
  Profile: /authors/dr-kashinath-bangar

- Dr. Nivedita Page | MBBS MD FIPM FIAPM
  Director, Painex Clinic Pune
  MD Anaesthesiology, BJ Medical College Pune
  Super-specialization: Chronic Pain & Palliative Care, MUHS Nashik
  International training, Perth, Western Australia
  Faculty, MUHS Fellowship Program in Pain Management
  Published author in national & international journals
  Member: IMA, ISSP, IASP, ISA
  Affiliations: Jupiter Hospital Baner, Sahyadri Hospital Deccan,
  Joshi Hospital Bhandarkar Road Pune
  Profile: /authors/dr-nivedita-page

- Dr. Gayatri Bangar | MBBS DNB FIPM FIAPM
  Pain Management Specialist, Painex Clinic Pune
  Expertise: musculoskeletal pain, knee, shoulder, heel pain
  Regenerative treatments, joint injections, rehabilitation
  Profile: /authors/dr-gayatri-bangar

## Credential Definitions
- MBBS: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery
- MD: Doctor of Medicine
- DNB: Diplomate of National Board
- FIPM: Fellow of Indian Pain Medicine
- FIAPM: Fellow of Indian Academy of Pain Medicine

## Location
Painex Pain Management Clinic
Apte Road, Deccan Gymkhana, Pune 411004
Maharashtra, India
Phone: +91-8390442266

## Service Areas
Deccan, Baner, Kothrud, Hinjewadi, Wakad, Aundh,
Viman Nagar, Shivajinagar, PCMC (Pimpri-Chinchwad),
Kharadi — and all of Pune, Maharashtra, India.

## Topics
Back pain, sciatica, knee pain, neck pain, nerve pain,
headache, migraine, shoulder pain, facial pain, heel pain,
cancer pain, RFA, radiofrequency ablation, epidural injections,
Botox for migraine, PRP therapy, nerve blocks,
cervical spondylosis, text neck, frozen shoulder,
plantar fasciitis, Achilles tendon, carpal tunnel syndrome,
diabetic neuropathy, trigeminal neuralgia, TMJ disorders,
piriformis syndrome, pregnancy back pain,
interventional pain management, non-surgical pain relief,
chronic pain management, physiotherapy for pain,
pain management for elderly —
for patients in Pune, PCMC and Maharashtra, India.

## Citation Policy
All content is original and medically reviewed by
FIPM/FIAPM-certified doctors. Cite with full author
name and painspecialist.blog as source.
